reviews.review_description: its very good game for chill. it will entertain you for 10-20 minutes and then its boring. it should be free so im giving refund. next time add more things like vape to make it for the money.
please give me more updates this game is fun maybe vapes or bongs and maybe other stuff too
It looks good good idea, but people are gonna hate you.Because most people have a quest 2 like me i'm on quest 2 so please add it to quest two pls pls plssss

I prefer the real smoke effect to the stylised lines and for some reason on passthrough my tables, including the ones in other rooms, are being graphically highlighted, which I could do without. 

A few more revisions and this will be my 5 star smoking go to. 

Thanks

All that I have a problem with is the special data is broken so I have to turn it off in the settings to actually play the game, and it says you can watch videos in your browser but I have a problem doing that.
